name: Chocolate Pecan Fudge Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup CHIPITS Semi-Sweet Chocolate chips, melted
1 Frozen Shortening Pie shell - thawed 15 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine the melted chocolate, corn syrup, sugar, and eggs.
2. Stir in the pecans.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell placed on a cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 20 minutes longer.
6. Cool completely then chill.
7. Slice and serve with vanilla ice cream and Rich 'N' Satin Chocolate Sauce. Makes 8 servings.
